00030 #ifndef _GENERIC_CONSOLE_H_
00031 #define _GENERIC_CONSOLE_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * Device data for the hardware-independent system console.
00035  *
00036  * devdata, send, and sendpolled are provided by the underlying
00037  * device, and are to be initialized by the attach routine.
00038  */
00039 
00040 #define CONSOLE_INPUT_BUFFER_SIZE 32
00041 
00042 struct con_softc {
00043         /* initialized by attach routine */
00044         void *cs_devdata;
00045         void (*cs_send)(void *devdata, int ch);
00046         void (*cs_sendpolled)(void *devdata, int ch);
00047         void (*cs_startpolling)(void *devdata);
00048         void (*cs_endpolling)(void *devdata);
00049 
00050         /* initialized by config routine */
00051         struct semaphore *cs_rsem;
00052         struct semaphore *cs_wsem;
00053         unsigned char cs_gotchars[CONSOLE_INPUT_BUFFER_SIZE];
00054         unsigned cs_gotchars_head;      /* next slot to put a char in */
00055         unsigned cs_gotchars_tail;      /* next slot to take a char out */
00056 };
00057 
00058 /*
00059  * Functions called by lower-level drivers
00060  */
00061 void con_input(/*struct con_softc*/ void *cs, int ch);
00062 void con_start(/*struct con_softc*/ void *cs);
00063 
00064 /*
00065  * Functions called by higher-level code
00066  *
00067  * putch/getch - see <lib.h>
00068  */
00069 
00070 #endif /* _GENERIC_CONSOLE_H_ */
